title: Create: Better Material
description: It is much easier to get to Copper-, Iron-, Zinc- and Gold Nuggets!
body:
There were many problems with Create if you wanted to automate Copper-, Iron-, Gold- and Zinc Nuggets. Because the player had to farm Tuff by hand and the outcome when you crushed the tuff isn't really that much.

For that reason, I created three new recipes and one new item.

 

The Steps to automate Copper, Gold etc. :

1.Step

Mix 5 Flint, 1 Cobblestone and 250mb Lava to get Tuff

2. Step

Crush the tuff to get the new item "Material Scrap" (Which is a Flint with fragments of the four materials) and you can get Copper Gold Zinc and Iron Nuggets with a specific chance

3. Step

Crush the Material Scrap to optain one flint and Copper Gold Zinc and Iron Nuggets with a specific chance

 

CREDITS:

I made this with Mcreator and VSC. I made the script and the item texture on my own.


_**If the Percentage of getting the Nuggets is too high please tell me that!**_

The CurseForge Page: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-better-material
